## [03:01 - 06:02]

So the journey starts here at the bottom, goes up here. It's kind of like a game of life, right? And we start here at the aware stage. So these are people that have never heard of your business before, right? And the goal is to make sure that you have some sort of marketing asset in every one of these boxes so that you are creating this journey that moves people into becoming a customer and everything else that we'll cover here in a minute. So the first step is aware, right? So an example of this is a prospect could see an ad from you on Facebook or maybe they hear about you from a referral, right? So pretty simple, aware. How does someone become aware of your business or your product or service? Pretty important for you to understand that. It's probably while you're here, right? But unfortunately, most people go from aware to convert and they're missing these two stages. So engage, maybe a prospect reads a blog post, they engage on social media, they watch a video, they're checking you out, right? They're engaging with you, they're getting a feel for your business. This step is so important and like I said, it's missed by a lot of businesses. The next step is subscribe, right? And basically subscribe is the permission for you to follow up with them, right? So for some business, it could be them opting in to receive gated content, right? A lead magnet. Maybe they're giving you an email address in exchange for a lead magnet. This could be a lot of different things. Not everyone is collecting email addresses, especially for e-commerce. Your strategy might be a little bit different. But how are you at least getting them to subscribe to the way that your company thinks, your values? And how are you giving them value in exchange for this contact information, right? The next step, convert. This is the step everyone wants to get to, right? So a prospect buys something, right? Or they schedule a demo or they sign up for a webinar. So they're either giving you money or time, right? This is when they really convert and they say, okay, I'm ready, right? But you see we have three steps that come before this. The next step after convert also commonly missed. This one is excite. So this is all about getting people pumped about the conversion, the thing that they just bought, or the thing that they just signed up for. They see the value in it because this will prevent buyer's remorse and it also sets you up really nice for ascension. So ascend is all about getting them to do more, right?
